g.text: Ticket Detail Modal Redesign — Layout Proportions & Metadata
Issue: main content too narrow, sidebar too wide — content-to-metadata ratio feels off
The payment gateway times out after 10s on
heavy load. Stripe webhook never fires.
Problem: 60/40 split — sidebar takes 40% of width but contains sparse metadata; description area feels cramped
Description (rich text editor — more room to breathe)
The payment gateway times out after 10s on heavy load.
Stripe webhook never fires. Affects ~12% of checkout flows.
Description editor is comfortable to use
One click to change, always visible
⑤ Relations section in main content
More vertical space for relation list
Click any field to edit inline
